title: 2 Sides Mod
description: A magic based mod using a new ore called Rose Quartz.
body:
A magic mod that uses a new ore called Rose Quartz.

- Mine the ore using an iron pick and smelt the impure Rose Quartz into Purified Rose Quartz. You can use the purified Rose Quartz to make an alerting block and an ore detecting item:
  
- The New Ore Detector displays the location of the closest ore on the Y-Axis of the block you use the detector on, if any at all.
- The Alert Block makes some sounds dependent on how you interact with it:
  - Right-clicking the block will produce a cowbell sound, and a banjo strum while crouching
  - or, if an Item or Entity is on top of the block, it will alert you that something is on the block!

- As of update 0.2.1a, there are now all manner of decoration blocks made from Rose Quartz! Stairs, Slabs, Doors, Trapdoors, Pressure Plates, Buttons, Fences and Gates, and Walls have all been added with the Rose Quartz palate. The Doors and Trapdoors open with redstone input much like their Iron counterparts. There's also a new fuel source called Fire Quartz! It's better than coal for sure! Don't miss out on lemons, theres a chance you can gain something from their bitter juice!

- As of update 0.2.2a, there is now a Rose Quartz Buster Blade with a weakening effect, and axe, a pick, a shovel, a hoe (The Ring-Sickle), a multi-type tool (that destroys blocks that axes, picks, and shovers break), and a hammer (3x3 pickaxe mining). Also added, Rose Quartz armor, similar to netherite in strength, makes you look pretty in salmon shades and tints. Put the full set on for a surprise buff!

- As of update 0.2.3a, a TON was added! Missing recipes were added. Villager trading was integrated, as well as a new villager that uses the Alert Block. The wandering trader was shown some love too. Custom trees and flowers now generate in the plains biomes! Ores now generate in the overworld, nether, and end! Ore detectors now spawn in jungle temples if they didn't before. A new item called the Data Tablet or Registry saves the last location the Ore Detector found an ore. Ores particles now make themselves known when the Ore Detector detects them. Most important of all, JEI was added as a dependency for easier recipe finding. 

- As of update 0.2.4b, a few more things were added now that the mod is in beta stage. Biomes and a new four-biome dimension were added, as well as two new structures: The Supply Hub and the Starter House. Two new mobs were added. The Rose Quartz Golem is a tameable mob whose spawn egg you can craft. Just remember to use the remote or you'll find they don't do much unless you attack. The Ruby Statue is a WIP boss. For now, it is just strong and resilient, only targeting players. Future plans include mob mind control for the boss. The Ruby Statue drops a new block that gets oxidized over time. You can stop the oxidization with a new item called the Energy Orb. 

- The Energy Orb is grown from energy seeds. Using Lemon Seeds and some Energy Tree parts, you can craft energy seeds. The Energy Orb can also be eaten, replaced Amethyst in the Purification Station's energy slot, and now works as a fuel in the Conductive Furnace. Energy Trees and their wood now have all the decoration blocks associated to them as well as the boat and chest boat items. Achievements were completed for all the mod's content as of right now. TerraBlender was added as a dependency for overworld biome spawning.

- As of update 0.2.43b, the purification table has been set aside for lack of function. It is out of my control. Moving foward the conductive furnace will be used until a solution is made known or I update to 1.21+. Lemon Juice will have a use later on.

- As of update 0.2.44b, a new set of armor and tools was added. The LIFE ore has been given functionality like its sister SOUL ore.

- As of update 0.2.45b, POWER ore has been given its uses. Next comes SHIFT ore, which will have a rather large update. Sorry to have spent so much time for so little. I promise the next update will be bigger.

- As of update 0.2.47b, CONTROL (not SHIFT) ore has been given its uses. To craft armor from the ore you must first create the templates and then use the smithing table to transform the template into an armor piece using another CONTROL shard and an elemtally aligned item: Fire/Magma Cream, Earth/Cobblestone, Air/String, Water/Prismarine Shard

Join the discord at https://discord.com/invite/6vmAJDfYgx
